beginningDatetime.description: Timezone aware datetime of the event.
beginningDatetime.title: Beginningdatetime

bookingLimitDatetime.description: Timezone aware datetime after which the offer can no longer be booked.
bookingLimitDatetime.title: Bookinglimitdatetime

quantity.description: Quantity of items currently available to pass Culture. Value 'unlimited' is used for infinite quantity of items.
quantity.title: Quantity

bookingLimitDatetime.title: Bookinglimitdatetime

quantity.description: Quantity of items currently available to pass Culture. Value 'unlimited' is used for infinite quantity of items.
quantity.title: Quantity

dates.description: Dates to add to the event. If there are different prices and quantity for the same date, you must add several date objects
dates.title: Dates

url.description: Link users will be redirected to after booking this offer. You may include '{token}', '{email}' and/or '{offerId}' in the URL, which will be replaced respectively by the booking token (use this token to confirm the offer - see API Contremarque), the email of the user who booked the offer and the created offer id
url.title: Url

venueId.description: List of venues is available at GET /offerer_venues
venueId.title: Venueid

conditionalFields.description: The keys are fields that should be set in the category_related_fields of an event. The values indicate whether their associated field is mandatory during event creation.
conditionalFields.title: Conditionalfields

bookingContact.description: Recipient email to contact if there is an issue with booking the offer. Mandatory if the offer has withdrawable tickets.
bookingContact.title: Bookingcontact

bookingEmail.description: Recipient email for notifications about bookings, cancellations, etc.
bookingEmail.title: Bookingemail

categoryRelatedFields.description: Cultural category the offer belongs to. According to the category, some fields may or must be specified.
categoryRelatedFields.title: Categoryrelatedfields

description.example: A great book for kids and old kids.
description.title: Description

enableDoubleBookings.description: If set to true, users may book the offer for two persons. Second item will be delivered at the same price as the first one. Category must be compatible with this feature.
enableDoubleBookings.title: Enabledoublebookings

externalTicketOfficeUrl.description: Link displayed to users wishing to book the offer but who do not have (anymore) credit.
externalTicketOfficeUrl.title: Externalticketofficeurl

hasTicket.description: Indicates whether the offer has an associated ticket. True if a ticket is available, False otherwise. To create an offer with tickets you must have developed the pass culture ticketing interface.
hasTicket.title: Hasticket

itemCollectionDetails.description: Further information that will be provided to attendees to ease the offer collection.
itemCollectionDetails.example: Opening hours, specific office, collection period, access code, email annoucement...
itemCollectionDetails.title: Itemcollectiondetails

location.description: Location where the offer will be available or will take place. The location type must be compatible with the category
location.title: Location

priceCategories.description: Available price categories for dates of this offer
priceCategories.title: Pricecategories

accessibility.description: Accessibility to disabled people. Leave fields undefined to keep current value
accessibility.title: Accessibility

bookingContact.title: Bookingcontact

bookingEmail.description: Recipient email for notifications about bookings, cancellations, etc.
bookingEmail.title: Bookingemail

priceCategories.description: Available price categories for dates of this offer
priceCategories.title: Pricecategories

status.description:
ACTIVE: offer is validated and active.

DRAFT: offer is still draft and not yet submitted for validation - this status is not applicable to offers created via this API.

EXPIRED: offer is validated but the booking limit datetime has passed.

INACTIVE: offer is not active and cannot be booked.

PENDING: offer is pending for pass Culture rules compliance validation. This step may last 72 hours.

REJECTED: offer validation has been rejected because it is not compliant with pass Culture rules.

SOLD_OUT: offer is validated but there is no (more) stock available for booking.

file.description: Image file encoded in base64 string. Image format must be PNG or JPEG. Size must be between 400x600 and 800x1200 pixels. Aspect ratio must be 2:3 (portrait format).
file.title: File
